original_prompt: 给这套产品做一张亚马逊白底图
optimized_prompt: Commercial product photography of a luxury bridal jewelry set (consisting of a tiara, a V-shaped drop necklace, and matching dangle earrings) against a pure white background (#FFFFFF). The tiara features intricate filigree-style openwork metal and rises to peaks in the center, densely paved with crystals. The necklace showcases a prominent V-drop silhouette with a large pear-shaped teardrop pendant. The earrings mirror the necklace's motif with suspended teardrop shapes. [Subject Lock]: Classic royal-style bridal set, silver-plated alloy, clear rhinestones, cubic zirconia crystals, high-polish chrome finish. Bright, even studio lighting to highlight the sparkle and faceted surfaces. Soft natural contact shadow. No text, no props, 8k resolution, ultra-sharp focus.
layout_logic: Standard Amazon listing layout (Main Image). The jewelry set should be arranged neatly in the center of the frame. The tiara should be placed at the top, slightly arched. The necklace should be laid out below it in a natural 'U' or 'V' shape, showcasing the drop pendant. The earrings should be placed symmetrically on either side inside the curve of the necklace or just below the tiara. Ensure significant white space (padding) around the edges, occupying about 85% of the frame. No text overlays.
